title: Football Supporter Vlogger Poster AI
sourceTitle: Football Supporter Vlogger Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium collectible football travel poster for ARGENTINA, built around expressive football traveler mascot with detailed hair and luxury poster styling, a fictional left-footed street-football legend, and Buenos Aires balconies, tango posters, steak grills, blue-white flags, street football murals, and stadium lights. Subject: expressive football traveler mascot with detailed hair and luxury poster styling appears as a charming stylized 3D collectible football traveler inspired by a fictional left-footed street-football legend, wearing sky blue, white, and gold football streetwear with souvenir patches, sitting on the bottom edge of a large vintage Polaroid frame while taking a cheerful smartphone selfie. Scene: Inside the Polaroid frame, Buenos Aires balconies, tango posters, steak grills, blue-white flags, street football murals, and stadium lights forms a miniature national travel world with architecture, local foods, crafts, transportation, festivals, lifestyle scenes, and subtle football culture. Composition: Fixed square luxury travel-poster composition: large vintage Polaroid frame, character seated on the lower frame edge, one leg popping outside the frame, smartphone selfie angle, premium monochrome doodles around the outer background, and strong 3D pop-out depth. Signature Elements: Football appears through murals, scarves, street art, football cafes, collectible souvenirs, decorative banners, and subtle tournament-inspired objects without copied official marks. Style: Charming stylized 3D animated aesthetic blended with luxury travel advertising, high-end collectible artwork, cinematic depth of field, warm golden-hour light, detailed textures, and tasteful vibrant color. Color Palette: Elegant gradients inspired by national supporter colors, balanced with warm golden light, premium cream paper tones, and refined monochrome travel doodles. Typography: At the top, display ARGENTINA in large elegant handwritten typography with a small fictional flag-style accent; below it place Blue-and-white dreams carried by every street; add The ball remembers every street that raised you as a handwritten quote on the Polaroid border. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Football Supporter Vlogger Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium collectible football travel poster for FRANCE, built around high-end 3D football adventurer with one leg popping outside the frame, a fictional elegant striker with collectible poster charisma, and Paris rooftops, river bridges, patisserie windows, blue-white-red scarves, street art, and elegant stadium cues. Subject: high-end 3D football adventurer with one leg popping outside the frame appears as a charming stylized 3D collectible football traveler inspired by a fictional elegant striker with collectible poster charisma, wearing navy, white, and silver travel-football jacket with refined sporty trim, sitting on the bottom edge of a large vintage Polaroid frame while taking a cheerful smartphone selfie. Scene: Inside the Polaroid frame, Paris rooftops, river bridges, patisserie windows, blue-white-red scarves, street art, and elegant stadium cues forms a miniature national travel world with architecture, local foods, crafts, transportation, festivals, lifestyle scenes, and subtle football culture. Composition: Fixed square luxury travel-poster composition: large vintage Polaroid frame, character seated on the lower frame edge, one leg popping outside the frame, smartphone selfie angle, premium monochrome doodles around the outer background, and strong 3D pop-out depth. Signature Elements: Football appears through murals, scarves, street art, football cafes, collectible souvenirs, decorative banners, and subtle tournament-inspired objects without copied official marks. Style: Charming stylized 3D animated aesthetic blended with luxury travel advertising, high-end collectible artwork, cinematic depth of field, warm golden-hour light, detailed textures, and tasteful vibrant color. Color Palette: Elegant gradients inspired by national supporter colors, balanced with warm golden light, premium cream paper tones, and refined monochrome travel doodles. Typography: At the top, display FRANCE in large elegant handwritten typography with a small fictional flag-style accent; below it place Elegance, speed, and a city that sings after dark; add Travel light, play beautifully, dream louder as a handwritten quote on the Polaroid border. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

imagePrompts.title: Football Supporter Vlogger Poster Variant 02

prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium collectible football travel poster for ARGENTINA, built around expressive football traveler mascot with detailed hair and luxury poster styling, a fictional left-footed street-football legend, and Buenos Aires balconies, tango posters, steak grills, blue-white flags, street football murals, and stadium lights. Subject: expressive football traveler mascot with detailed hair and luxury poster styling appears as a charming stylized 3D collectible football traveler inspired by a fictional left-footed street-football legend, wearing sky blue, white, and gold football streetwear with souvenir patches, sitting on the bottom edge of a large vintage Polaroid frame while taking a cheerful smartphone selfie. Scene: Inside the Polaroid frame, Buenos Aires balconies, tango posters, steak grills, blue-white flags, street football murals, and stadium lights forms a miniature national travel world with architecture, local foods, crafts, transportation, festivals, lifestyle scenes, and subtle football culture. Composition: Fixed square luxury travel-poster composition: large vintage Polaroid frame, character seated on the lower frame edge, one leg popping outside the frame, smartphone selfie angle, premium monochrome doodles around the outer background, and strong 3D pop-out depth. Signature Elements: Football appears through murals, scarves, street art, football cafes, collectible souvenirs, decorative banners, and subtle tournament-inspired objects without copied official marks. Style: Charming stylized 3D animated aesthetic blended with luxury travel advertising, high-end collectible artwork, cinematic depth of field, warm golden-hour light, detailed textures, and tasteful vibrant color. Color Palette: Elegant gradients inspired by national supporter colors, balanced with warm golden light, premium cream paper tones, and refined monochrome travel doodles. Typography: At the top, display ARGENTINA in large elegant handwritten typography with a small fictional flag-style accent; below it place Blue-and-white dreams carried by every street; add The ball remembers every street that raised you as a handwritten quote on the Polaroid border. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:

promptTranslations.fr:
